base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of after_castle_cutscenes — a ui from 1990 super mario world. Post-castle Koopaling-defeat cutscenes × 7 Koopalings + bonus text. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
